response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference lyrics contained several OCR/transcription errors (e.g., '高らかな心臓に' instead of '高鳴る心臓に', '散々といふ有田をただながめた' instead of '燦々と降る夕立をただ眺めた', and '遠だくってく' instead of '遠ざかってく'). 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference as a structural guide but corrected spelling and kanji strictly based on precise audio perception of the sung vocals. 3. Timing & Pacing: Kept the lobby loop (00:00 - 02:45) silent as there were no vocals or story-significant text elements. Successfully synchronized the subtitles with the vocal start at 02:45.200, dividing phrases logically to prevent lagging and ensure natural reading speed.

subtitles.original: 高鳴る心臓に祈りを乗せて
subtitles.english: With my prayers loaded into my beating heart,

subtitles.original: 曖昧な夢を描く
subtitles.english: I draw a vague dream.

subtitles.original: 幻想は想像のまま
subtitles.english: The fantasy remains as just imagination,

subtitles.original: 終われないんだ
subtitles.english: it cannot end like this.

subtitles.original: みんなー！今日見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Thank you so much for coming to watch today!

subtitles.original: 答えを永遠と探し続けて
subtitles.english: Continuously searching for the answer for eternity,

subtitles.original: 何者かになりたくて
subtitles.english: longing to become someone.

subtitles.original: 燦々と降る夕立をただ眺めた
subtitles.english: I merely stared at the brilliantly falling evening shower.

subtitles.original: 優しく寄り添って 心が晴れるのなら
subtitles.english: If gently nestling close clears up my heart,

subtitles.original: 翼が生えたような気がして
subtitles.english: I feel as if wings have sprouted,

subtitles.original: いつだって隣にいるから
subtitles.english: because I will always be right by your side.

subtitles.original: だって言葉紡いで歌うことが
subtitles.english: Because spinning words and singing...

subtitles.original: ...あたしの運命だ
subtitles.english: ...is my destiny.

subtitles.original: 世界にありふれた虚しささえも
subtitles.english: Even the emptiness that floods the world,

subtitles.original: 上書きして
subtitles.english: I will overwrite it.

subtitles.original: 路地裏に咲いた花のように
subtitles.english: Like a flower blooming in a back alley,

subtitles.original: 願いを照らす
subtitles.english: I will illuminate wishes...

subtitles.original: 小さな光に憧れて
subtitles.english: ...longing for that small light.

subtitles.original: 名前も持たない歌なんて
subtitles.english: A song that doesn't even have a name...

subtitles.original: 神様なら認めてくれない
subtitles.english: ...God would surely never recognize it.

subtitles.original: ひとつひとつ枯れない花のように
subtitles.english: But like a flower that never withers,

subtitles.original: 昨日の自分にさよならして
subtitles.english: I say goodbye to the me of yesterday.

subtitles.original: こぼれた涙
subtitles.english: With my spilled tears,

subtitles.original: うまく笑えなくてもいいかな
subtitles.english: is it okay even if I can't smile well?

subtitles.original: だって理想は遠ざかってくばかり
subtitles.english: Because my ideals keep drifting further away,

subtitles.original: もう散々だ
subtitles.english: it's already a complete disaster.

subtitles.original: どれだけ手を伸ばして叫んだって
subtitles.english: No matter how much I reach out and scream,

subtitles.original: 届かないの
subtitles.english: it doesn't reach.

subtitles.original: 望めばいつか叶うはずって
subtitles.english: Because I believe that if I wish for it,

subtitles.original: 信じてるから
subtitles.english: it will come true someday.

subtitles.original: どうか歌よ響いて
subtitles.english: Please, let my song resonate!

subtitles.original: あぁ、心臓の鼓動が今日も
subtitles.english: Ah, the beating of my heart...

subtitles.original: うるさい
subtitles.english: ...is so loud again today.
